executionModelDetail: Net-new feature delivered directly in-session, parent-expanded by bubbles.workflow because the active workflow runtime lacked the runSubagent tool (the established pattern for specs 085/089/097/098 in this repo). All phases (analyst, ux, design, plan, implement, test, validate, audit, docs + quality sweep) are authored/executed directly with real captured evidence in report.md.
inProgressReason: Substantive work is COMPLETE and re-verified this finalization (host-native go1.25.10): 22/22 internal/preflight unit+contract tests PASS with 0 skips (PREFLIGHT_TEST_EXIT=0); ./smackerel.sh config generate emits PREFLIGHT_MIN_AVAILABLE_RAM_MB=6000 + _DISK_GB=15 into dev.env + test.env; ./smackerel.sh pre-flight exits 0 (OK) and the SMACKEREL_PREFLIGHT_OVERRIDE=1 path exits 0 with a loud WARNING; artifact-lint is clean. This run CLOSED the six spec-099-ownable governance gaps: G022 Check 6 (regression+security evidenced; simplify/gaps/harden/stabilize/chaos recorded as verified no-op phaseStubs), G022 Check 6B (executionHistory parent-expanded provenance for every claimed phase), Check 8A (SCOPE-01/02 -> Scope-Kind contract-only), Check 8B (SCOPE-02 Consumer Impact Sweep), G053 Check 13B (report.md Code Diff Evidence), and G094 Check 34 (Single-Capability + Single-Implementation Justifications); the G040 deferral-language hit was also cleared. Status stays in_progress because two conditions remain OUTSIDE 099's ownership: the framework G091 planning-chain gate (repo-wide, framework-owned, immutable here) and the spec(099) commit gate (Check 17), which the orchestrator satisfies with a scoped commit after this no-commit run.

simplify.reason: Pure-core / host-I/O split is already minimal: one Evaluate, one Run, no new abstraction or duplicate path to collapse. Nothing to simplify.

gaps.reason: Every scenario SCN-099-A01..A07 maps to a green test; the 22-test suite covers below/at/above threshold, fail-loud NO-DEFAULTS, override, no-secret, and the wiring contract. No coverage gap.

harden.reason: spec/design/scopes are coherent and traceable (artifact-lint + G068 green); an additive host-side guard needs no further hardening rounds.

stabilize.reason: Deterministic static evaluator over synthetic inputs; no time/network/ordering nondeterminism and no flakiness surface.

chaos.reason: No live service to fault-inject for a host-side CLI check; the abuse-probing is the 2 adversarial wiring drift-detectors + the 4 fail-loud parse tests, each proving rejection.
